name: Ron Brown Scholar Program

eligibility.other_requirements: African American high school senior; academic excellence; demonstrated need; community service and leadership; must be applying to four-year college or university

stackable_notes: Generally stackable but students should verify with their institution. Some schools reduce need-based aid when external scholarships are received; advisors should check institutional policy on external awards.
notes: Honors the legacy of Commerce Secretary Ron Brown with ~20 awards annually — one of the most selective African American-specific scholarships. Selection emphasizes academic achievement, financial need, leadership, and service simultaneously. Scholars gain access to a tight-knit alumni network and annual enrichment conferences.
